info.title: Idea Foundry API
info.description:
REST API for the Idea Foundry platform — an AI-powered Product Requirements Document (PRD) generator.

## Overview

Idea Foundry transforms raw product ideas into implementation-ready PRDs using multi-agent AI orchestration (CrewAI + Gemini). The API powers both the Slack bot and the web application frontend.

## Web App Integration Guide

### Authentication
All endpoints (except Health and Slack webhooks) require an SSO Bearer token:
```
Authorization: Bearer <jwt_token>
```
When `SSO_ENABLED=false` (development mode), authentication is bypassed and an anonymous user context is returned.

### Core Workflows

**1. Project Management** — Create and manage projects that group related PRD ideas:
- `GET/POST /projects` — List/create projects
- `GET/PATCH/DELETE /projects/{project_id}` — Project CRUD

**2. Idea Lifecycle** — Track ideas from inception to completion:
- `GET /ideas` — List ideas with filters (project_id, status)
- `GET /ideas/{run_id}` — Get idea details (sections progress, delivery status)
- `PATCH /ideas/{run_id}/status` — Archive or pause an idea

**3. PRD Generation Flow** — Kick off and manage AI-driven PRD creation:
- `POST /flow/prd/kickoff` — Start a new PRD flow (returns 202 Accepted)
- `GET /flow/runs/{run_id}` — Poll for progress (status, iteration, section content)
- `POST /flow/prd/approve` — Approve or provide feedback on current section
- `POST /flow/prd/pause` / `POST /flow/prd/resume` — Pause/resume flows
- `GET /flow/prd/resumable` — List flows that can be resumed

**4. Publishing & Delivery** — Publish completed PRDs to Confluence and Jira:
- `GET /publishing/pending` — List PRDs ready for delivery
- `POST /publishing/confluence/{run_id}` — Publish to Confluence
- `POST /publishing/jira/{run_id}` — Create Jira tickets
- `GET /publishing/status/{run_id}` — Check delivery status

### Pagination
List endpoints (`/projects`, `/ideas`) support cursor-based pagination:
- `page` (1-based), `page_size` (10, 25, or 50)
- Responses include `total`, `page`, `page_size`, `total_pages`

### Error Handling
All errors return a structured `ErrorResponse` with `error_code`, `message`, and optional `detail`.
HTTP status codes: 400 (validation), 401 (auth), 404 (not found), 409 (conflict), 422 (unprocessable), 500/503 (server error).

### CORS
Configured via `CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS` env var (defaults to `http://localhost:3000`).

### Idea Status Lifecycle
```
inprogress → completed → (published)
inprogress → paused → (resume) → inprogress
inprogress → failed → (resume) → inprogress
* → archived
```

error_code.title: Error Code
error_code.description: Machine-readable error code. One of: LLM_ERROR, BILLING_ERROR, INTERNAL_ERROR.

run_id.title: Run Id
run_id.description: The run_id affected by this error, if applicable.

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: Additional diagnostic detail (e.g. the original exception message).

ErrorResponse.title: ErrorResponse
ErrorResponse.description:
Standard error envelope returned by all API endpoints.

Returned for any unexpected server-side error (HTTP 500) or when
the upstream LLM / OpenAI service is unavailable (HTTP 503).

Error codes:
    ``LLM_ERROR``      — The LLM backend returned an unrecoverable
                         error after exhausting all retry attempts
                         (e.g. timeouts, model overload).
    ``BILLING_ERROR``  — OpenAI billing / quota issue detected
                         (e.g. ``insufficient_quota``,
                         ``billing_hard_limit_reached``).
    ``INTERNAL_ERROR`` — Any other unexpected server-side failure.

is_approved.title: Is Approved
is_approved.description: Whether the executive summary has been approved.

ExecutiveSummaryDraft.title: ExecutiveSummaryDraft
ExecutiveSummaryDraft.description: Tracks the iterative executive summary produced in the draft phase.

critique.title: Critique
critique.description: Critique feedback from critique_prd_task, initially null.

ExecutiveSummaryIteration.title: ExecutiveSummaryIteration
ExecutiveSummaryIteration.description: A single iteration record for the executive summary phase.

status.title: Status
status.description: Job lifecycle status: queued, running, awaiting_approval, paused, or completed. Note: flow errors always result in 'paused' (not 'failed'), allowing the run to be resumed.

error.title: Error
error.description: Error message when the job was paused due to an error. Present when the job encountered an LLM, billing, or internal error and was automatically paused.

queued_at.title: Queued At
queued_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the job was created.

completed_at.title: Completed At
completed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the job reached a terminal state.

queue_time_ms.title: Queue Time Ms
queue_time_ms.description: Time spent in queue (started_at - queued_at) in milliseconds.

running_time_ms.title: Running Time Ms
running_time_ms.description: Time spent running (completed_at - started_at) in milliseconds.

output_file.title: Output File
output_file.description: Path to the generated PRD markdown file, if available.

confluence_url.title: Confluence Url
confluence_url.description: URL of the published Confluence page, if available.

JobDetail.title: JobDetail
JobDetail.description: A persistent job record from the ``crewJobs`` collection.

run_id.title: Run Id
run_id.description: The run this action was applied to.

action.title: Action
action.description: The action that was taken: 'approved', 'continuing refinement', 'continuing refinement with user feedback', or 'paused'.

section.title: Section
section.description: The section key the action was applied to.

current_step.title: Current Step
current_step.description: 1-based step number of the current section.

sections_approved.title: Sections Approved
sections_approved.description: Number of sections approved so far (including this one if approved).

sections_total.title: Sections Total
sections_total.description: Total number of sections in the PRD.

is_final_section.title: Is Final Section
is_final_section.description: True when this approval completed the last section — the flow will finalize.

active_agents.title: Active Agents
active_agents.description: Provider identifiers currently participating in the flow (e.g. ['openai']).

dropped_agents.title: Dropped Agents
dropped_agents.description: Agent identifiers that were removed from the flow after failing during parallel drafting.

agent_errors.title: Agent Errors
agent_errors.description: Map of dropped agent name to its error message.

PRDActionResponse.title: PRDActionResponse
PRDActionResponse.description: Response for approval, pause, and feedback actions.

run_id.title: Run Id
run_id.description: The run to approve or continue.

approve.title: Approve
approve.description: True to approve the current section, False to keep refining.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: Optional critique feedback from the user. When provided with approve=false, this feedback is used as the critique for the current section instead of the agent's self-critique.
examples: Add more detail to the security section and include OAuth2 flow.

selected_agent.title: Selected Agent
selected_agent.description: Which agent's result to use (e.g. 'openai'). Required when multiple agents produced results for the current section. Defaults to the first available agent when omitted.

sections.title: Sections
sections.description: Ordered list of PRD sections with their current state.

all_approved.title: All Approved
all_approved.description: True when every section has been approved.

PRDDraftDetail.title: PRDDraftDetail
PRDDraftDetail.description: Structured draft state for API responses.

idea.title: Idea
idea.description: The product feature idea to build a PRD for.
examples: Add dark mode to the dashboard

auto_approve.title: Auto Approve
auto_approve.description: When true, the flow runs end-to-end without pausing for manual approval at each section (same behaviour as the CLI). Sections auto-iterate between PRD_SECTION_MIN_ITERATIONS and PRD_SECTION_MAX_ITERATIONS and are auto-approved when the critique contains SECTION_READY after the minimum iterations. The POST /flow/prd/approve endpoint is not needed when this is enabled — poll GET /flow/runs/{run_id} for progress instead.

run_id.title: Run Id
run_id.description: Unique identifier for this flow run.

PRDKickoffResponse.title: PRDKickoffResponse
PRDKickoffResponse.description:
Response for POST /flow/prd/kickoff.

Returned when a new PRD flow is accepted.  The flow runs in the
background through Idea Refinement → Requirements Breakdown →
Phase 1 (Executive Summary iteration) → Phase 2 (9-section
auto-iterate).  Poll GET /flow/runs/{run_id} for status.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last activity.

sections.title: Sections
sections.description: Section keys that have draft content.

exec_summary_iterations.title: Exec Summary Iterations
exec_summary_iterations.description: Number of executive summary iterations completed.

req_breakdown_iterations.title: Req Breakdown Iterations
req_breakdown_iterations.description: Number of requirements breakdown iterations completed.

PRDResumableRun.title: PRDResumableRun
PRDResumableRun.description: An unfinalized run that can be resumed.

run_id.title: Run Id
run_id.description: The run_id of an unfinalized working idea to resume.

auto_approve.title: Auto Approve
auto_approve.description: When true, the resumed flow runs end-to-end without pausing for manual approval at each section (same behaviour as the CLI). Poll GET /flow/runs/{run_id} for progress instead of calling POST /flow/prd/approve.

next_section.title: Next Section
next_section.description: Key of the next section to iterate.

next_step.title: Next Step
next_step.description: 1-based step number of the next section.

PRDResumeResponse.title: PRDResumeResponse
PRDResumeResponse.description:
Response for POST /flow/prd/resume.

Returned when a paused or unfinalized run is successfully resumed.
Sections with existing content will skip the draft step and resume
directly into the critique→refine loop.  Degenerate content left by
a previous crash is cleaned up automatically.

iteration.title: Iteration
iteration.description: Total iteration count across all sections.  In the two-phase flow, Phase 1 (Executive Summary) iterates ≥ PRD_EXEC_RESUME_THRESHOLD times, and Phase 2 sections each iterate between PRD_SECTION_MIN_ITERATIONS and PRD_SECTION_MAX_ITERATIONS.

update_date.title: Update Date
update_date.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last update.

completed_at.title: Completed At
completed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the run was completed.

error.title: Error
error.description: Error message if the run was paused due to an error. Prefixed with an error code: BILLING_ERROR, LLM_ERROR, or INTERNAL_ERROR. Note: errors always result in status='paused' (never 'failed'), so the run can be resumed after the issue is resolved.

current_section_key.title: Current Section Key
current_section_key.description: Key of the section currently being iterated.

current_step.title: Current Step
current_step.description: 1-based step number of the current section.

sections_approved.title: Sections Approved
sections_approved.description: Number of approved sections (convenience, derivable from current_draft).

active_agents.title: Active Agents
active_agents.description: Provider identifiers currently participating in the flow (e.g. ['openai']).

dropped_agents.title: Dropped Agents
dropped_agents.description: Agent identifiers that were removed after failing during parallel drafting.

agent_errors.title: Agent Errors
agent_errors.description: Map of dropped agent name to its error message.

original_idea.title: Original Idea
original_idea.description: The raw idea before the Idea Refinement agent enriched it. Empty when refinement was skipped.

idea_refined.title: Idea Refined
idea_refined.description: Whether the idea was refined by the Idea Refinement agent.

finalized_idea.title: Finalized Idea
finalized_idea.description: Copy of the last executive summary content once Phase 1 completes. Empty until the executive summary iteration loop finishes.

requirements_breakdown.title: Requirements Breakdown
requirements_breakdown.description: Structured product requirements produced by the Requirements Breakdown agent. Empty until the breakdown phase completes.

executive_summary.description: Iterative executive summary produced in Phase 1. Contains the full iteration history with content, critique, and timestamps for each cycle.

confluence_url.title: Confluence Url
confluence_url.description: URL of the Confluence page where the PRD was published. Empty until post-completion publishing succeeds.

jira_output.title: Jira Output
jira_output.description: Summary of Jira tickets created from PRD requirements. Empty until post-completion ticketing completes.

output_file.title: Output File
output_file.description: Path to the generated PRD markdown file on disk. Empty until the flow finalizes.

current_draft.description: Full structured draft with per-section state.

step.title: Step
step.description: 1-based step number in the PRD workflow.

updated_date.title: Updated Date
updated_date.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last update to this section.

agent_results.title: Agent Results
agent_results.description: Per-agent draft results. Keys are provider identifiers (e.g. 'openai'), values are the markdown content each agent produced for this section.

selected_agent.title: Selected Agent
selected_agent.description: Which agent's result was selected by the user.

PRDSectionDetail.title: PRDSectionDetail
PRDSectionDetail.description: A section's state as returned in run-status responses.

PendingPRDItem.title: PendingPRDItem
PendingPRDItem.description: A PRD awaiting Confluence publish or Jira ticket creation.

output_file.title: Output File
output_file.description: Absolute path to the output markdown.

ConfluencePublishResult.title: ConfluencePublishResult
ConfluencePublishResult.description: Result of publishing a single PRD to Confluence.

JiraCreateResult.title: JiraCreateResult
JiraCreateResult.description: Result of creating Jira tickets for a single run.

DeliveryStatusResponse.title: DeliveryStatusResponse
DeliveryStatusResponse.description: Delivery status for a specific run.

WatcherStatusResponse.title: WatcherStatusResponse
WatcherStatusResponse.description: File watcher and cron scheduler status.

PublishingErrorResponse.title: PublishingErrorResponse
PublishingErrorResponse.description: Error envelope returned by publishing endpoints.

ProjectCreate.title: ProjectCreate
ProjectCreate.description: Request body for creating a new project.

ProjectUpdate.title: ProjectUpdate
ProjectUpdate.description: Partial update — only submitted fields are changed.

ProjectItem.title: ProjectItem
ProjectItem.description: A project with its configuration and metadata.

figma_api_key_set.title: Figma API Key Set
figma_api_key_set.description: True if a Figma API key is configured (key itself not exposed).

IdeaItem.title: IdeaItem
IdeaItem.description: An idea (working PRD) with progress tracking and delivery status.

IdeaStatusUpdate.title: IdeaStatusUpdate
IdeaStatusUpdate.description: Update idea status. Only 'archived' and 'paused' transitions are supported.

ssoAuth.description: SSO RS256 JWT token. Obtain from the SSO service login endpoint. Validated locally via public key or remotely via `/sso/oauth/introspect`. Bypassed when `SSO_ENABLED=false`.

slackVerification.name: X-Slack-Signature
slackVerification.description: Slack request signing (HMAC-SHA256). Used for /slack/* endpoints.

ssoWebhook.name: X-Webhook-Signature
ssoWebhook.description: SSO webhook HMAC-SHA256 signature for /sso/webhooks/* endpoints.

tags.name: Health
tags.description: Liveness probes, version info, and token diagnostics.

tags.name: Projects
tags.description: Project CRUD — create, list, update, delete projects with Confluence/Jira/Figma configuration.

tags.name: Ideas
tags.description: Idea lifecycle — list, get, archive, pause ideas with progress tracking.

tags.name: Flow Runs
tags.description: PRD generation flow management — kickoff, approve, pause, resume, and monitor.

tags.name: Jobs
tags.description: Persistent job records for flow execution tracking.

tags.name: Publishing
tags.description: Confluence page publishing and Jira ticket creation for completed PRDs.

tags.name: Slack
tags.description: Slack bot integration — Events API, Block Kit interactions, OAuth v2.

tags.name: SSO Webhooks
tags.description: Single sign-on user lifecycle event receiver.
